config.cfg_repr: V2Params(exposure_mapping='percentile', logistic_midpoint=0.0, logistic_steepness=0.6, cognitive_feasibility=1.0, physical_feasibility=0.95, robotics_maturity=0.0, adoption=1.0, adoption_path=[np.float64(0.05), np.float64(0.18571428571428572), np.float64(0.3214285714285714), np.float64(0.45714285714285713), np.float64(0.5928571428571429), np.float64(0.7285714285714285), np.float64(0.8642857142857143), np.float64(1.0), 1.0, 1.0], robotics_cognitive_coupling=0.0, robotics_lag=6.0, robotics_base=1.0, sector_adoption_mult=1.0, sector_adoption_ceiling=1.0, task_job_passthrough=1.0, retained_profit_share=0.8, price_reduction_share=0.15, survivor_gains_share=0.04999999999999996, auto_cost=0.3, offshore_share=0.0, compute_effective_rate=0.27, ui_weeks=26, reabsorption_rate=0.05, reabsorption_rung=1, reemployment_haircut=0.4, reabsorption_floor_pctile=0.3, reab_wage_baumol=0.0, reab_wage_crowding=0.0, lfp_exit_rate=0.1, survivor_elasticity=-0.5, survivor_raise_ceiling=1.5, survivor_spillover_to_profit=0.5, mpc=0.95, consumption_stickiness=1.0, marginal_taxable_multiplier=1.0, demand_multiplier=1.5, price_passthrough=0.5, productivity_passthrough=0.9, denominator='absolute', automation_tax_rate=0.0081, attrition_rate=0.025, ssdi_annual=18000.0, baseline_growth_rate=0.08, income_tax_mult=1.0, corp_tax_mult=1.0, cons_tax_mult=1.0, ubi_recapture_rate=0.25, surplus_capture=1.0, dividend_tax_rate=0.188, passthrough_individual_rate=0.25, state_response='mix', state_cut_share=0.5, state_rate_hike_cap=0.5, interest_rate=0.04, ubi_annual=0.0, swf_profit_share=0.0, fed_vat_rate=0.05, corp_offset_scale=1.0, consumption_scale=1.0, n_periods=10)
overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 30% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0081 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo
Federal VAT: 5% on a consumption base of two-thirds of value added, eroding with the standing income withdrawal (no behavioral response modeled)

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 3.8 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ the FY2025 federal deficit, every year — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 23.5 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 3.8 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.8× what all states spend on K-12 schools, every year
